name: com.bankruptcyobserver/mcp
title: Bankruptcy Observer
description: US business bankruptcy data via MCP: search, EIN lookup, docket items, NAICS/state. Same as Bankruptcy Observer REST API. Contact: https://www.bankruptcyobserver.com/contact.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: API token (Bearer). Obtain via this server: list_plans_tool then purchase_plan_tool to get Stripe Checkout; after payment you receive a token. Or at bankruptcyobserver.com.
